quick_skim.title: Magneto-rotational instabilities in solids: application to neutron-star crusts
quick_skim.abstract: The magneto-rotational instability can generate strong, turbulent substructure within magnetised shear flows. The efficacy of the mechanism as a function of microphysical aspects of the fluid, such as stratification and diffusivity, has been explored extensively. One aspect that has not been studied thus far, however, is whether the instability can also operate in solids. Motivated by the possibility that solid regions within planets or degenerate stars may rotate differentially with respect to liquid or gaseous layers during some phase of their life, we examine the extent to which elasticity suppresses the instability. A simplified, plane-parallel analysis reveals that only in cases where the flow is strongly sheared, such that the magnetic tension that would result from the instability in a liquid exceeds the shear modulus of the elastic cavity, can magnetic growth occur. In the context of dynamical tides in binary neutron-star mergers, this implies that the magnetic field can be amplified in the crust prior to coalescence only if the star boasts a spin frequency of $\gtrsim 300$Hz. If viscous heating weakens the crystalline structure prior to resonance, the required spin frequency is reduced.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: studies magneto-rotational instability in neutron-star crusts, related to interior dynamics and glitch mechanisms
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 研究中子星壳层中的磁旋转不稳定性，与内部动力学和脉冲星故障相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 研究中子星壳层中的磁旋转不稳定性，与内部动力学和脉冲星故障相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 研究中子星壳层中的磁旋转不稳定性，与内部动力学和脉冲星故障相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Examines magneto-rotational instability in solid neutron-star crusts, finding that only strongly sheared flows can overcome elasticity, with implications for crustal substructure and glitch mechanisms.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文研究了固体中子星壳层中的磁旋转不稳定性（MRI），弥补了以往仅关注流体中的MRI的不足。通过简化的平面平行分析，发现仅在强剪切流中弹性效应才会被抑制，MRI才能在壳层中发生。这一结果对理解中子星壳层的湍流子结构和可能的脉冲星故障机制具有重要意义。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文研究了固体中子星壳层中的磁旋转不稳定性（MRI），弥补了以往仅关注流体中的MRI的不足。通过简化的平面平行分析，发现仅在强剪切流中弹性效应才会被抑制，MRI才能在壳层中发生。这一结果对理解中子星壳层的湍流子结构和可能的脉冲星故障机制具有重要意义。
